scripts.build: npm run --prefix artifacts/rakshak-ai build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('artifacts/rakshak-ai/dist/public', 'dist', {recursive: true})"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run --prefix artifacts/rakshak-ai typecheck
